      Modifier and Type
      Constant Field
      Value

      COMMA_SEPARATOR
      ","
      public static final String
      CSV_HEADERS
      "Amount,Category,Date"
      public static final String
      FILENAME_ERROR_MESSAGE
      "Filename must be non-empty and end with .csv"
      public static final String
      TRANSACTION_LIST_ERROR_MESSAGE
      "The transaction list must be non-null and not empty."

      Modifier and Type
      Constant Field
      Value
      public static final String
      TIMESTAMP_DATE_FORMAT
      "dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm"
